ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride */,
  "pickup_datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the ride's pickup time */,
  "dropoff_datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the ride's dropoff time */,
  "passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in the taxi */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the ride in miles */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare amount for the ride */,
  "tip" REAL /* Tip amount for the ride */,
  "tolls" REAL /* Toll amount for the ride */,
  "total_fare" REAL /* Total fare amount (fare + tip + tolls) */,
  "taxi_color" TEXT /* Color of the taxi */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the ride */,
  "pickup_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pickup zone */,
  "dropoff_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dropoff zone */,
  "ride_status" TEXT /* Status of the ride (e.g., completed, cancelled) */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle used for the ride */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who completed the ride */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_dropoff_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("dropoff_zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_pickup_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("pickup_zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough where the zone is located */,
  "zone_type" TEXT /* Type of zone (e.g., commercial, residential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "borough_code" TEXT /* Code for the borough (e.g., MN, BK, QN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the ride data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the ride data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the ride data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "driver_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of driving experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the ride data was versioned */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_versions_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)
column_names: Timestamp of the ride's pickup time
Timestamp of the ride's dropoff time
Number of passengers in the taxi

Code for the borough (e.g., MN, BK, QN)
Unique identifier for each access event
